item.title: Are Cyient DLM Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Cyient DLM Ltd's latest results show a significant sequential profit increase and improved operating margins, but a year-on-year revenue decline indicates ongoing challenges. While there are signs of recovery, the company's lower return metrics and persistent revenue issues suggest the need for further operational improvements. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Purple Finance Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Purple Finance Ltd's latest results show a positive shift, with a net profit of ₹0.02 crores and a significant revenue increase of 172% year-on-year. However, challenges remain, including modest profitability, high interest expenses, and promoter dilution, making the sustainability of this recovery uncertain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Sunteck Realty Ltd. latest results good or bad?
item.description: Sunteck Realty Ltd.'s latest results show mixed performance: while net profit increased by 26.51% year-on-year, revenue declined 1.48% sequentially, raising concerns about demand sustainability and margin compression amid rising interest costs. Overall, investors should closely monitor these trends for future implications. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Mahindra EPC Irrigation Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results show strong revenue growth at ₹107 crores, up 14.48% sequentially, but net profit fell significantly to ₹4.79 crores, down 26.19%, indicating challenges in cost management and profitability despite increased sales. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are 360 ONE WAM Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: 360 ONE WAM Ltd's latest results show strong annual growth with net sales up 30.71%, but recent quarterly revenue declined by 5.59% and profit margins have compressed, indicating potential risks despite long-term resilience. Overall, the performance is mixed, warranting close monitoring of operational trends. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are DB (International) Stock Brokers Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: DB (International) Stock Brokers Ltd's latest results are concerning, showing an 82.84% decline in net profit and a 21.85% drop in revenue year-on-year, alongside compressed margins and high tax burdens, indicating significant operational challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Transformers & Rectifiers India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Transformers & Rectifiers India Ltd's latest results show a 15.70% revenue growth to ₹782.67 crores, but net profit declined by 5.19% to ₹89.28 crores, indicating profitability challenges due to margin compression and rising costs. Overall, while revenue growth is positive, concerns about sustainability and investor sentiment remain. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Rajratan Global Wire Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Rajratan Global Wire Ltd's latest results show strong revenue growth, with a record quarterly revenue of ₹314.29 crores, but a significant decline in net profit to ₹15.43 crores and reduced operating margins raise concerns about profitability and sustainability. Overall, while revenue is up, the company's declining margins and profitability metrics indicate operational challenges. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Persistent Systems Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Persistent Systems Ltd's latest results are strong, showing a 25.10% YoY increase in net sales and a 33.73% YoY rise in net profit, but the company faces cost pressures and a declining stock price, raising concerns about valuation sustainability. Overall, while operational performance is solid, investors should monitor these challenges closely. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Tata Investment Corporation Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Tata Investment Corporation Ltd's latest results show strong year-on-year growth, with net sales up 143.34% and net profit up 69.22%. However, there were sequential declines in both metrics, and concerns about capital efficiency due to a low return on equity suggest a mixed overall performance. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are HCL Technologies Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: HCL Technologies Ltd's latest results show record net sales growth of 12.35%, but net profit growth has slowed to 4.20% and operating margins have contracted, raising concerns about profitability sustainability amidst rising costs and competitive pressures. Investors should watch for improvements in operational efficiency in the coming quarters. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Are Nestle India Ltd latest results good or bad?
item.description: Nestle India Ltd's latest Q4 FY26 results are strong, with net sales growing 22.60% year-on-year to ₹6,747.79 crores and net profit increasing 27.18% to ₹1,110.90 crores, indicating effective operational performance and a solid financial position. The company is well-positioned for long-term growth in the recovering FMCG sector. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Skyline Millars Q4 FY26: Operational Collapse Deepens as Revenue Plunges to Zero
item.description: Skyline Millars Ltd., a micro-cap realty company with a market capitalisation of ₹86.00 crores, reported a complete operational shutdown in Q4 FY26, with net sales collapsing to zero from ₹0.54 crores in the previous quarter. The company posted a net loss of ₹0.46 crores during the quarter, marking a dramatic deterioration from the ₹0.27 crores profit recorded in Q4 FY25. Following the results announcement, the stock declined 3.85% to close at ₹19.50 on April 22, 2026, reflecting mounting investor concerns about the company's operational viability. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Maharashtra Scooters Q4 FY26: Profit Plunges 92% as Revenue Collapses
item.description: Maharashtra Scooters Ltd., the Pune-based holding company majority-owned by Bajaj Holdings & Investment Limited, reported a dramatic 92.23% year-on-year decline in net profit for Q4 FY26, with earnings collapsing to ₹4.01 crores from ₹51.63 crores in the same quarter last year. The sharp deterioration came as quarterly revenue plummeted 9.32% year-on-year to just ₹6.03 crores, marking the lowest quarterly sales figure in recent years and raising serious concerns about the sustainability of the company's business model. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Signpost India Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Mixed Technical Signals and Strong Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Signpost India Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, creating a golden cross on 22 Apr 2026. While this technical event often signals a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture that calls for careful analysis. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Golden Cross Confirmed: Do Angel One Ltd's Other Technical Indicators Agree?
item.description: The 50-day moving average has crossed above the 200-day moving average for Angel One Ltd, signalling a golden cross on 22 Apr 2026. While this technical event often suggests a shift towards bullish momentum, the broader technical and fundamental context presents a nuanced picture that merits closer examination. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Krishana Phoschem Ltd Forms Golden Cross Amid Strong Technicals and Robust Price Momentum
item.description: The 50-day moving average for Krishana Phoschem Ltd has crossed above the 200-day moving average, signalling a golden cross on 22 Apr 2026. This technical event coincides with a 2.38% gain on the day and is supported by bullish weekly and monthly momentum indicators, suggesting a well-aligned technical backdrop. Yet, the question remains whether this crossover is a robust confirmation or merely a lagging signal in a stock that has already experienced significant gains. Time: 3 hours ago
